title: Kuba's Modded Factions
description: A modded Faction Server channeling classic elements with modern refinement!
body:
This modpack is the combination of various Tech and Magic mods, all handpicked and hand balanced by cheesebobi (Kuba) to provide the best Modded Factions experience in Minecraft. 

There are plenty fun mods in this highly optimised modpack which will provide everything from complex machinery to amazing terrain generation.
